paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12 as of July 20, 2026, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. that the company will host its second quarter 2026 earnings call on August 13, 2026, as reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026. This news item may be driving current interest in the company.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a recent SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20, 2026, and several 8-K filings, one of which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing in the feed, although details of this filing are not provided.
